method: WebFetch on arxiv.org abstract page; cross-check title and author list against site source
verifier: Haiku agent dispatched with the prompt at data/prompts/citation-verification.md

verifications.cited_title: From Cortico-Thalamic Circuits to Linear Attention
verifications.note: Title differs significantly from cited version. Cited is misleading. Site corrected 2026-05-10.

verifications.actual_title: BABILong: Testing the Limits of LLMs with Long Context Reasoning-in-a-Haystack
verifications.actual_authors: Yuri Kuratov, Aydar Bulatov, Petr Anokhin, Ivan Rodkin, Dmitry Sorokin, Artyom Sorokin, Mikhail Burtsev
verifications.note: Cited as shorthand only; full title includes descriptive subtitle. Acceptable shorthand. Site updated to full title.

real_attribution_error_papers: arxiv:2308.08708 (Butlin et al. — Chalmers wrongly cited as author)
arxiv:2507.21509 (Persona Vectors — wrongly attributed wholesale to Anthropic)

scope_caveats: This pass covered the cross-package reading list (14 references). It did NOT cover citations that appear only inside individual claim dossiers.
There are ~35 additional unique citations across the 10 dossiers that remain unverified.

Some dossiers (claim 7 in particular) reference arxiv IDs with future-plausible dates (2603.x = March 2026, 2604.x = April 2026); these were not on this verification list because they aren't in the cross-package reading list. They remain unverified.
